zh.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett出生在英國。他於1566年與Dennice A Parke在英國英格蘭肯特霍斯蒙登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1604年5月在英國肯特霍斯蒙登，埋葬在英國肯特霍斯蒙登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett出生在英国。他于1566年与Dennice A Parke在英国英格兰肯特霍斯蒙登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1604年5月在英国肯特霍斯蒙登，埋葬在英国肯特霍斯蒙登。

nameMeanings.name: Doggett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Duckett with voicing of the medial consonant. Alternatively, the name may also be from a Middle English rhyming pet form of Roger (see Dodge ) + the diminutive suffix -et. But whether the medial -g- was pronounced as a stop /g/ (as in dog) or an affricate /dʒ/ (as in Roger) is impossible to tell.

variants.name: Duckett
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Duket. This may sometimes have been an early Middle English pet form of an Old English Ducc(a), but was more often a pet form of Marmaduke, especially in Yorkshire (see Duke ). Marmaduke itself is from Irish Maol Maedóc ‘servant of Maedóc’, Maedóc being the name of prominent Irish saints of the 6th and 7th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett was born in England. He married Dennice A Parke in 1566, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in May 1604, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, and was buried in Horsmonden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett est né à Angleterre. Il a épousé Dennice A Parke en 1566, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1604, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett wurde in England geboren. Er hat 1566 in Horsmonden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Dennice A Parke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1604 in Horsmonden, Kent, England und wurde in Horsmonden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett è nato il nel England. Lui sposato Dennice A Parke nel 1566, nel Horsmonden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1604, nel Horsmonden, Kent, England, e fu sepolto a Horsmonden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Doggettはイギリスで生まれた。1566年にイギリスイギリスケントホールスモンデンでDennice A Parkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1604年5月にイギリスケントホールスモンデンで死去し，イギリスケントホールスモンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett(은)는 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1566년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 호르스몽에서 Dennice A Parke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1604년 5월 영국 켄트 호르스몽에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 호르스몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett nasceu em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Dennice A Parke em 1566, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1604, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett родился в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Dennice A Parke в 1566 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер май 1604 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия и был похоронен в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Doggett nació en Inglaterra. Se casó con Dennice A Parke en 1566, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1604, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra.
